channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: El 70% de las empresas requieren una experiencia de cliente simplificada por parte de sus proveedores telco
item.description: Las expectativas de los clientes empresariales han cambiado. Así lo refrenda la primera edición del estudio anual La perspectiva B2B: las seis principales expectativas de los clientes empresariales de telecomunicaciones firmada por el Instituto de Investigación de Capgemini.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: JavaOne 2025 heralds Java’s 30th birthday
item.description: With Java advancing toward its 30th anniversary, Oracle will hold its annual JavaOne conference next week, centering around the Java language, the evolution of the Java platform, and the role of Java in areas such as generative AI and machine learning.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 3 keys to defining data sovereignty: Security, privacy, and portability
item.description: Data sovereignty has emerged as a critical concern for businesses and governments, particularly in Europe and Asia.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Putting networks at the top of CIOs’ agendas
item.description: Ever since Steve Jobs stood on stage to unveil the first iPhone in 2007, the focus of the global technology industry has been on innovation in the software, mobile and cloud markets. Smartphone apps and software-as-a-service products were the centers of value creation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google adds Gemini AI image enhancements to Workspace videoconferencing
item.description: Google is jazzing up videoconferencing and chat features in its Workspace suite with new generative AI (genAI) features, including image and background enhancements for Google Meet and built-in translation for Google Chat, the company said on its Workspace update page.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fortinet reinforces OT network security platform
item.description: Fortinet has bolstered its OT Security Platform to help customers more effectively protect industrial control systems and other operational technology networks from cyberattacks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Finally: some truth serum for lying genAI chatbots
item.description: Ever since OpenAI made ChatGPT available to the public in late 2022, the large language model (LLM)-based generative AI (genAI) revolution has advanced at an astonishing pace. Two years and four months ago, we had only ChatGPT.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Apprentice Reality TV Show Heads to Amazon Prime Video
item.description: The long-running reality TV show that launched Donald Trump's career will be available on Amazon's streaming platform, starting with the first season premiering Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: White House nominates top leaders for CISA, other DHS components
item.description: Sean Plankey has been tapped to lead CISA after serving in key cyber roles during Trump's first term. His nomination comes as CISA grapples with recent cuts. The post White House nominates top leaders for CISA, other DHS components first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: What the breakup of Google could mean for Apple and other tech companies
item.description: Alphabet may have hoped that Donald Trump winning the White House would quell talk of a Google breakup, but that doesn’t seem likely.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Apple Ending Support for Old HomeKit Architecture: What You Need to Know
item.description: Apple will soon end support for its old HomeKit architecture, requiring users to upgrade to the latest version to avoid interruptions with their smart home devices.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster
item.description: Rethinking the delivery process for new capabilities is essential to put cybersecurity and the warfighter front and center. The post How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: This limited-edition timepiece turns the iconic Technics SL-1200 turntable into a watch, and I want one
item.description: Wear your vinyl-loving heart on your sleeve? A limited edition Technics SL-1200-inspired watch can help with that.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works. Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Ransomware gangs allegedly hit two major US healthcare firms, 300,000 patients have data stolen
item.description: Sunflower Medical Group and Community Care Alliance confirmed suffering a cyberattack as Rhysida claims responsibility.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Go-based TypeScript to dramatically improve speed, scalability
item.description: Microsoft is developing a native TypeScript implementation based on Google’s Go language. The initiative promises dramatic improvements in editor startup speed, build times, and memory usage, making it easier to scale TypeScript to large code bases, Microsoft said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Observe links end-user experience with back-end troubleshooting
item.description: Observe has bolstered its observability platform with frontend monitoring capabilities that it says will enable developers and IT teams to gain visibility into application performance on end-user browsers and mobile applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AI driving a 165% rise in data center power demand by 2030
item.description: Global power demand from data centers will increase 50% by 2027 and by as much as 165% by the end of the decade compared with 2023, according to a recent report from Goldman Sachs Research The industry is shrugging off the potential of DeepSeek – which claimed large-scale AI modeling capabilities fr
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation
